summary: I inspected my own source tree before hermescheck ran. Replace this with a concise architecture summary.

claims.title: The main loop and tool boundary are explicit
claims.recommendation: Use this as context when reviewing orchestration or tool-boundary findings.

risks.title: Completion closure may stop too early
risks.recommendation: Check file creation -> index update -> impression card -> anchor mapping -> pointer registration -> acceptance.

false_positive_notes.title: Provider files are intentional extension points
false_positive_notes.recommendation: Do not treat normal provider implementation as hidden LLM usage without a bypass path.

improvement_plan.title: Add impression pointers
improvement_plan.recommendation: Represent reusable recall as topic_anchor + semantic_hash + pointer_ref.
